DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF FRANKLIN PALMA SOZA'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO COMPEL THE DEPOSITIONS OF DEFENDANT LUIS DARIO SARAT AND PERSON MOST KNOWLEDGEABLE LUCY SARAT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT LUIS DARIO SARAT AND PERSON MOST KNOWLEDGEABLE LUCY SARAT SHALL APPEAR FOR THEIR DEPOSITIONS WITHIN TWO WEEKS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. IF DEFENDANT LUIS DARIO SARAT AND PERSON MOST KNOWLEDGEABLE LUCY SARAT FAIL TO APPEAR FOR THEIR DEPOSITIONS WITHIN TWO WEEKS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER, SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $3,550 SHALL BE DUE AND PAYABLE AGAINST DEFENDANTS IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF WITHIN THREE WEEKS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER CATALANOTTI, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-24-2020 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, JUL-24-2020 HEARING HELD RE: PLAINTIFF FRANKLN SOZA'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS AGAINST ALL DEFENDANTS; REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS. THE COURT MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULES AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION IS GRANTED. DEFENDANTS SHALL JOINTLY PAY MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $5,260 WITHIN 10-DAYS OF THE DATE OF THE ORDER. DEFENDANT MR. SARAT IS TO APPEAR FOR DEPOSITION WITHIN 10-DAYS OF THE DATE OF THE ORDER. ISSUE SANCTIONS ARE ORDERED AGAINST ALL DEFENDANTS AND ALL AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES IN DEFENDANTS' ANSWER ARE STRICKEN. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM. JUDGE PRO TEM: STEPHANIE KRMPOTIC; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Atty. SCOTT S. NAKAMA, Esq. of Ladva Law Firm (Tel: 415-296-8844) for Plaintiffs;
Defendant LUIS DARIO SARAT (Tel: 415-826-2574) in pro per.

Hearing Re: Plaintiff Frankln Soza's Motion For Terminating Sanctions Against All Defendants; Request For Monetary Sanctions.

The parties stipulate to the matter being decided by the judge pro tem. The parties and the judge pro tem authorize the clerk to sign the stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court modifies its tentative ruling and rules as follows: Plaintiff's motion is granted. Defendants shall jointly pay monetary sanctions in the amount of $5,260 within 10-days of the date of the order. Defendant Mr. Sarat is to appear for deposition within 10-days of the date of the order. Issue sanctions are ordered against all defendants and all affirmative defenses in defendants' Answer are stricken.

Plaintiff's counsel to prepare and submit a proposed order to the judge pro tem.

Judge Pro Tem: Stephanie Krmpotic; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF FRANKLN SOZA's Motion To Compel Defendant Luis Dario Sarat And Person Most Knowledgeable Lucy Sarat; Request For Monetary Sanctions:

Plaintiff Franklin Palma Soza's unopposed Motion to Compel the depositions of Defendant Luis Dario Sarat and Person Most Knowledgeable Lucy Sarat is GRANTED. Defendant Luis Dario Sarat and Person Most Knowledgeable Lucy Sarat shall appear for their depositions within two weeks of notice of this order. If Defendant Luis Dario Sarat and Person Most Knowledgeable Lucy Sarat fail to appear for their depositions within two weeks of notice of this order, sanctions in the amount of $3,550 shall be due and payable against defendants in favor of plaintiff within three weeks of notice of this order.

Order is signed in open court.
